title: DAJAVE 150 Pack Paper Bowls 12oz Disposable Bowls for Hot Food, Eco-Friendly Party Bowls Biodegradable and Compostable White Disposable Paper Bowls for Party, Picnic, BBQ
features: Premium Material: This 12 oz disposable bowls made of natural high quality natural bagasse and biodegradable material, it is natural color without bleaching, safe and harmless, Unlike the cheap paper bowls, this disposable biodegradable bowls are waterproof, oil resistant, non-deformable, and not easy to cut, great for daily use
Paper Bowls Size: The disposable paper bowls are 350ml/12 ounce in capacity, 13.5cm in diameter and the depth of 4.6cm, enough to hold many different foods for daily life

Microwave and Refrigerator Safe: This disposable bowls can be safely used in the microwave and be stored in the freezer, After testing, the white paper bowl can be used normally in the microwave oven at 120 degrees and in the freezer at -20 degrees, not will it melt or deform
Easy to Store: The small disposable bowl for hot food has lightweight and stackable design, which makes them very easy to store in the kitchen or take it outside for a picnic

Wide Use: The white disposable pudding bowls can use for parties to hot and cold meals, soup, desserts, salads, ice cream and so on, Disposable bowls perfect for parties, daily meals, picnics, buffets, BBQ party, gathering, wedding and large events and etc
description: Disposable Bowls 12oz, White Paper Bowls Biodegradable and Compostable Bagasse Bowls, Small Disposable Bowl for Hot Food for Parties, Camping, Catering,BBQ Picnic Feature Material: Disposable bowls for hot food are made from high quality natural bagasse, eco-friendly and biodegradable, safe and harmless. Durable: These sugarcane bowls are durable, waterproof and oil resistant, stronger than ordinary paper bowls, can be used to hold liquids and hot foods. Wide use: The white disposable bowls perfect for daily meals, picnics, buffets, BBQ and large events and etc. Good service: We focus on high quality products and provide favorable clients experiences If you have any problem, please contact us without hesitation.
